name: io.github.vaggeliskls/release-notes-mcp
description: A small, generic MCP server for combining GitHub/GitLab/Gitea releases into product release notes

environmentVariables.name: RELEASE_MCP_CONFIG_JSON
environmentVariables.description: Config (repos + contextSources) as inline JSON, e.g. {"repos":["myorg/web"],"contextSources":[]}. Use this for uvx/hub launches with no file to mount. Either this or RELEASE_MCP_CONFIG is required.

environmentVariables.name: RELEASE_MCP_CONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to a config.json file (alternative to RELEASE_MCP_CONFIG_JSON). Used when mounting a real file, e.g. in Docker.

environmentVariables.name: TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Auth token for the provider (GitHub PAT / GitLab / Gitea token). Optional for public repos.

environmentVariables.name: PROVIDER
environmentVariables.description: Forge to read releases from: github | gitlab | gitea. Defaults to github.

environmentVariables.name: BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: API base URL — only for self-hosted GitLab or Gitea/Forgejo.
